message:
test(proptest): expand gc (23→33), lock (11→34), spsc_ring_buffer (20→33) property tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add comprehensive property-based tests for three modules:
- gc: empty map, full/no overlap, stats arithmetic, threshold monotonicity, settings PartialEq
- lock: field independence, distinctness, JSON size bounds, extra/missing fields, numeric ranges
- spsc_ring_buffer: capacity-1 edges, depth precision, partial drain/refill, drop semantics, stress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
